programs.title: House
programs.desc: When Cuddy's mother is admitted to the hospital, she won't let House treat her, but his team discovers secrets she kept from Cuddy and her sister.

programs.title: House
programs.desc: When a waitress with a perfect memory suffers temporary paralysis, her older sister visits her in the hospital, which triggers high stress levels and even more health complications.

programs.title: House
programs.desc: After House traumatizes a fifth-grade class with explicit medical stories during Career Day, he's sent to the principal's office and two students offer him relationship advice.

programs.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programs.desc: When a navy lieutenant becomes the victim of fatal radiation poisoning, the NCIS team set out to find the person behind it.

programs.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programs.desc: Sam goes undercover as an MMA fighter after a Marine bleeds to death outside a club. It does not take him long to find out that he is not the only undercover officer in the gym.

programs.title: Wicked City
programs.desc: Detectives Jack Roth and new partner Paco Contreras are assigned to track down a killer who preys on women seeking fame in1980s Los Angeles.
